block_00: Black Friday and Christmas trading explained
block_03: Picking the right assets for trading is never easy, as there are many factors to consider. This task becomes even more complex during the holiday season, which often brings additional volatility. And there are other important aspects to keep in mind, such as trade volume and accurate timing.
block_04: So how can traders make the right choice and maximize their potential in the next few months? This article offers an overview of the main businesses that might be affected by the holiday season, as well as 3 tips to grow and protect your capital. Keep reading to prepair for the holiday trading and finish the year strong!
block_08: I heard that some traders use the economic calendar to search for trading ideas. How does it actually work?
block_11: It’s true: many traders use the economic calendar to analyse financial markets and catch the latest trends. The economic calendar shows key events that may affect certain assets and cause price changes. Review this material to learn how to understand this tool and use it to achieve your trading goals.
